hero.subtitle: Chat with Leonard, your AI yacht concierge. Get instant help with everything maritime! 🛥️

chat.inputPlaceholder: Tell me about your yacht plans...
chat.welcome1: Ahoy! ⚓ I'm Leonard, your AI yacht concierge.
chat.welcome2: How can I help you today? You can ask me for advice, find a specific service like a mechanic in St. Tropez, or plan a full itinerary.
chat.error: I'm sorry, I had trouble processing that. Could you try rephrasing?
chat.budgetSaved: Perfect! I've updated your budget. Your plan is looking great! ⚓

servicePrompt.title: Let's Find Your Marine Services!
servicePrompt.subtitle: Swipe to find the best services for your yacht. ⚓

profile.name: Leonard
profile.detailsContent: I'm your dedicated AI yacht concierge, trained on thousands of successful voyages. My goal is to make your maritime planning process smooth and enjoyable. Let's create your perfect voyage together!

features.title: Your Perfect Yacht Experience, Simplified
